category_sources: Official GitHub README describes krane as a command-line tool for shipping changes to a Kubernetes namespace and understanding the result.
source_facts.description says Krane is a Kubernetes deploy tool with rollout verification.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use the name krane.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README contains installation, usage, and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official Shopify GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes krane as a command-line Kubernetes deployment tool.
source_facts.description provides Kubernetes deployment and rollout-verification context.
